## How verified

<!-- How did you check this works? e.g. `npm run build`, ran the dashboard against
     an openspec/ workspace, exercised the affected flow. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run build` passes with no TypeScript errors
- [ ] Change is focused; no unrelated reformatting or committed build output (`dist/`, `build/`)
- [ ] Docs updated if behavior/commands/architecture changed (README / ARCHITECTURE.md)
- [ ] Commits follow [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/) (`feat:`, `fix:`, `docs:`, `chore:`, …)
- [ ] For a non-trivial change, there's a corresponding OpenSpec proposal under `openspec/`
